response.justification: Exceptional full-stack depth with 15+ years of professional experience significantly exceeds the 6-year requirement; currently a Staff Engineer contributing to AI agent infrastructure and MCP development. Demonstrates strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise, high-scale system design, and proven software craftsmanship. Primary gaps are framework-specific (React, Nest.js, Vitest) rather than fundamental—readily addressable given demonstrated ability to rapidly master new technologies across diverse stacks. Auth/security expertise not explicitly evidenced but likely present given architecture-focused roles. Strong candidate who can contribute immediately while solidifying specific tech stack knowledge.
strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement with 15+ years full-stack development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded; currently Staff Engineer level.
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise with deep TDD and software craftsmanship practice; proven track record across multiple senior roles emphasizing code quality and testing culture.

Demonstrated high-scale system architecture (millions requests/second at Dunnhumby) and infrastructure competency (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD); current AI agent infrastructure focus adds strategic value.
concerns: React not demonstrated; resume shows Ember.js for frontend work. While both are frameworks, specific React proficiency requires confirmation during interview.
Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned despite being in primary stack. Candidate has extensive Node.js and testing knowledge, but these specific tools are not demonstrated.
Authentication and authorization best practices not explicitly mentioned in resume, despite being listed as required skill. Would need verification during technical discussion.
